entries.title: ## Fake Bold PDF Test Document
entries.content:
## Fake Bold PDF Test Document

Normal text: Hello World

Fake bold text below (each character drawn twice):

BOLD TEXT SAMPLE

Test i ng Dedupl i cat i on

More normal text: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.

entries.title: Note: The 'fake bold' lines above have each character rendered twice at slightly...
entries.content: Note: The 'fake bold' lines above have each character rendered twice at slightly offset positions, which causes text extraction to show doubled characters like 'BBOOLLDD' instead of 'BOLD'.
